subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the ninth of Ramadan was received. In truth, in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما که بتاریخ نهم رمضان بود رسید فی الحقیقه در سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
